title.en: Many domain ancestors responded one after another.

content.en:
"Obey the alliance leader's arrangement!"

Many domain ancestors responded one after another.

In the face of the Dark Destruction Domain, they are powerless.

Moreover, the Dark Destruction Domain is a place to destroy the Holy Clan and the Three Thousand Evil Clans, and they will not have mercy on cultivators.

Even if these domain ancestors surrendered, they would not accept it.

Therefore, both sides must live and die, and there is no second way.

Soon, the other domain ancestors learned about the imminent arrival of the Devouring Clan with the powerhouse of the Dark Destruction Domain, and they were terrified one by one.

Originally, they left the Divine Heaven Realm just to find a new realm to settle down.

Unexpectedly, it hadn't been stable for long, and there was another big incident in the Daoshan realm.

At this time, even if you want to leave the Dao Mountain Realm and return to the Divine Heaven Realm, it is useless.

It hasn't been long since the Divine Heaven Realm was destroyed, and even if he went back, he would still be waiting for death.

Moreover, the Dark Forbidden Domain is also more dangerous, and when I migrated here before, there were also domain ancestors who fell.

Instead of risking going back and waiting for death, it is better to fight in the Daoshan Realm.

At the very least, they are not hopeless.

--------------------

Dark Forbidden Realm.

In an area far away from the Daoshan Realm, a group of Domain Ancestors flew in the Dark Forbidden Domain on a huge ship.

This ship can easily resist the power of the dark and forbidden as well as any strange powers, and no amount of visual or auditory hallucinations can help this ship.

Moreover, it is very fast, and it is a very common means of transportation in the Dark Destruction Domain, which is suitable for the domain ancestors to wander away from the Dark Forbidden Domain.

What's more, it also boasts a location feature.

Once the positioning is successful, you can also open the gate of time and space, and let the army of the Dark Destruction Domain descend.

The Gate of Time and Space is also one of the means of destroying the Holy Race, which also causes the Holy Race of Destruction to easily cross the long Dark Forbidden Domain, and can attack many realms under the command of the Dark Holy Domain at any time, and can retreat at any time.

It is precisely because of the existence of the Gate of Time and Space that it is difficult for the Dark Sanctuary to help the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain.

Of course.

It's not that the Dark Sanctuary can't create a gate of time and space, it's just that it's hard to do.

First of all, there are no ancestors of time and space dual cultivation in the Dark Sanctuary, there are only a few half-step ancestors who have embarked on the path of time and space dual cultivation ancestors, but the gate of time and space created by the half-step ancestor is very ordinary, and the distance spanned is not far.

However, the Dark Destruction Domain has an ancestor of dual cultivation in time and space, which can create a space-time gate that spans endless distances and transports the creatures of the Dark Destruction Domain.

The path of the ancestor is already very difficult, just walking on the path of the ancestor is very demonic, I don't know how many demons can become the ancestor of the Supreme Domain is very reluctant, if there is no ancestor law, there is no way to walk on the path of the ancestor for endless years.

Moreover, the path of the time ancestor and the path of the space ancestor were two extremely difficult path of the ancestor, not to mention that it would be even more difficult to combine the two path of the ancestor into one.

It is precisely because of this that the Dark Sanctuary is unable to create a space-time gate that crosses the territory of the Endless Dark Forbidden Realm.

Of course, that is the ancestor of the dual cultivation of time and space is not necessarily very powerful, and the ancestor of the Dark Sanctuary who is sure to kill the other party also exists.

It's a pity that the ancestor of the space-time dual cultivation never came out, and the Dark Sanctuary didn't dare to enter the Dark Destruction Domain, otherwise he would be looking for death.

As time passed, the ship from the Dark Destruction Domain got closer and closer to the Daoshan Realm.

on the ship.

"How long will it take to get to that realm?"

The one who opened his mouth was the Kanshui Holy Son of the Devouring Clan.

The Devouring Clan's Holy Son, Kanshui Holy Son, was one of the leaders of this plan.

There were also five holy sons of the White Bone Clan and the Demon Hell Clan, for a total of six holy sons.

The strength of these six Holy Sons is not ordinary, they all have top-level domain ancestor cultivation, and their strength is comparable to that of the strongest domain ancestor, and they have even killed the supreme domain ancestor.

The Devouring Clan is a weaker evil clan among the three thousand evil clans in the Dark Destruction Domain, and its status is not high, so there is no way to open the gate of time and space, if it crosses the distant dark forbidden realm to destroy a realm, it will take too long, and it will be a trouble to come back.

And with the Gate of Time and Space, you can call in your clansmen for support at any time, and you can quickly withdraw to the Dark Destruction Domain.

Otherwise, once they destroy a realm, if they don't have time to retreat, they will be rushed by the powerful presence of the Dark Sanctuary, and they will die.

Therefore, without the Gate of Time and Space, they would not dare to destroy the realm under the command of the Dark Sanctuary.

"Kanshui Holy Son, there are about thirty years left!"

The Manyao Holy Ancestor reported.

"Thirty years, not long!" muttered the Kanshui Son.

At this time, the Demon Hell Clan's Dead Saint Son spoke: "Kanshui Holy Son, didn't that domain ancestor of your Devouring Clan go to that realm to investigate, he should have arrived a long time ago, why hasn't there been any news yet?"

"Can't be contacted!" Kanshui Saint Son shook his head and said, "I tried to get in touch, but I couldn't get in touch, I don't know what the reason is." However, according to the news passed on by my clan, in the original realm, they devoured all the worlds, even if a new cultivation civilization was born, it would definitely not be very powerful, and perhaps even the domain ancestor might not be able to be born. Although the strength of the Blood Rainbow Saint Ancestor is not strong, it is also a domain ancestor, so it shouldn't encounter any danger!"

The White Bone Clan's Bai Yu Holy Son said: "It's just a realm, what are you worried about, what kind of strong person can be born in such a small realm, even if it is the birth of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, there are more than one or two Supreme Domain Ancestors that we have killed!"

"Yes!"

The other sons nodded their heads.

In fact, they weren't worried about any security, but they were worried that the realm would be destroyed by the others of the Dark Destruction Domain, causing them to run for nothing.

After all, there are too many powerhouses in the Dark Destruction Domain, and they are nothing at all.

If other evil clans or the Saint Destroyer Clan destroyed that realm and didn't share this information, they naturally didn't know about it, and it was very likely that they would run away in vain.

In the blink of an eye, thirty years have passed.

At this time, the Kanshui Holy Son and the others were about to arrive at the Daoshan Realm, and through the special detection treasures, they detected that there was indeed a realm not far away.

"Hahaha, the realm is still there, let's destroy this realm, collect the power of realm destruction, and condense it into a destruction crystal, then it's gone!"

Several Holy Sons said excitedly.

Destroying the realm and condensing the Destruction Crystal would not help them much in their cultivation, but for the Destruction Saint Clan, the Destruction Crystal was a real treasure, enough to exchange for many precious treasures and inheritances.

The purpose of their destruction of the realm is to collect destruction crystals and trade with the destruction saint race, which is also the meaning of the existence of these evil races.
